name: Data Repository Service
description: GA4GH standard for accessing data objects

name: Task Execution Service
description: GA4GH standard for executing computational tasks

name: Tool Registry Service
description: GA4GH standard for registering and discovering tools

versions.description: refget Sequences v2.0.0 — adds support for non-unique sequence names, compatibility with GA4GH Service Info API, and VRS sequence identifiers

name: refget Sequence Collections
description: GA4GH standard for generating unique identifiers for collections of biological sequences such as reference genomes, transcriptomes, and proteomes. Extends refget Sequences to operate over groups of sequences.

versions.description: refget Sequence Collections v1.0.0 — initial approved GA4GH product release

name: Beacon API
description: A data discovery API that allows federated querying of genomic and biomedical data worldwide. Supports queries on genomic variants, phenotypic and clinical data, and metadata while preserving dataset privacy and ownership.

versions.description: Beacon v1.0 — original release supporting presence/absence queries for genomic variants
Beacon v2.0.0 — approved GA4GH standard, adds phenotypic/clinical data queries and rich metadata responses
Beacon v2.1.1 — released December 13, 2024. Adds VRS v1.3 compatibility and improved inline documentation
Beacon v2.1.2 — released July 1, 2025. Schema fixes and OpenAPI improvements

name: RNAget API
description: A GA4GH API standard for retrieval of processed RNA data including feature-level expression data from RNA-seq experiments and coordinate-based signal data from ChIP-seq, methylation, or similar epigenetic experiments.

versions.description: RNAget v1.1.0 — adds GA4GH Service Info endpoint support

name: Passports
description: A GA4GH security standard defining machine-readable digital identities that convey data access authorisations (Visas) for researchers. Enables role-based and attribute-based access control across federated genomic data systems.

versions.description: Passports v1.0 — approved GA4GH standard for digital identity and data access permissions

name: Data Use Ontology
description: A GA4GH standard providing a shared vocabulary of machine-readable terms for tagging datasets with data use permissions and restrictions. Enables automated matching between data access requests and dataset consent conditions, facilitating compliant secondary use of controlled-access genomic data.

versions.description: DUO release 2021-02-23 — approved GA4GH standard for data use terms, referenced by genomics repositories in over 15 countries
